topic: Managing Saved Blueprints From Your Dashboard
learningGoal: User can return to saved Blueprints, understand what is stored, and use the dashboard as their home base.
keyPoints: Your dashboard keeps your saved Blueprints in one place so you do not need to regenerate them every time
Open a saved Blueprint to revisit your Energy Type, Authority, centers, gates, and AI Synthesis insights
Use saved entries to compare your understanding over time instead of treating one reading as a one-time event
Keep your dashboard organized around the charts and readings you actually return to
toneNotes: Practical and low-friction. The message is continuity and ease, not hype.
